expectations.text: Plan includes UTF-8 conversion with BOM
expectations.evidence: Mentions: 'GEDCOM 7.0 requiere estrictamente UTF-8 con BOM'

expectations.text: Plan mentions removing CONC for GEDCOM 7.0
expectations.evidence: Mentions: 'se confirmó que el tag CONC ha sido eliminado en la versión 7.0'

expectations.text: Plan mentions handling diacritics mapping from ANSEL
expectations.evidence: Mentions: 'mapeo de ANSEL a Unicode (invirtiendo el orden de diacríticos)'
